mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM product WHERE name = #{name} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT price FROM product WHERE name = #{name} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT stock >= #{quantity} FROM product WHERE name = #{name} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, stock, shelf_time, preparation_time, is_seasonal, season_start, season_end, is_regional, available_regions, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{shelfTime}, #{preparationTime}, #{isSeasonal}, #{seasonStart}, #{seasonEnd}, #{isRegional}, #{availableRegions}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
